title: microservices-sim-poc: Worked examples and headless CLI runner for CloudSim Plus-K8s
description: Runnable Kubernetes worked examples (org.cloudsimplus.examples.kubernetes) and a headless CLI/REST runner accompanying the paper "CloudSim Plus-K8s: A Contract-Driven Extension for Kubernetes Container Orchestration Simulation." Exercises the org.cloudsimplus.kubernetes extension (https://github.com/Othmane-zarai/cloudsimplus-k8s).
